headline: AMD Plays Central Role As UALink 2.0 Shapes Future AI Clusters
summary: UALink Consortium has ratified the UALink 2.0 Specification for open AI accelerator and chiplet interconnects. The update adds features such as In-Network Compute and standardized interfaces to support distributed AI systems. Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) is a key backer of the consortium, tying this standard directly to its AI hardware ambitions. For investors tracking Advanced Micro Devices at a share price of $231.82, this standards news sits alongside very strong recent returns,...

headline: Meta expands CoreWeave partnership with new $21B AI cloud deal
summary: Meta Platforms (META) is doubling down on its partnership with CoreWeave (CRWV) through a new $21 billion deal to better leverage CoreWeave's AI cloud platform for scale. Meta also released its new Muse Spark AI model earlier this week. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley breaks down the headlines.

headline: Are Intel Investors Tired of Winning Yet? Chipmaker Bags Another Big Score
